summary: Tested critical features for Fiscal Tax Canarie: document preview, download, notifications, and declarations. Backend: 9/15 tests passed (6 skipped due to fixture dependencies). Frontend: All core features working - admin dashboard, declarations list, notification sending. Found 1 issue: Document preview shows error 'Impossibile caricare il documento' for some documents.

minor.issue: Document preview fails for some documents - returns data but frontend cannot render preview

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Impossibile caricare il documento' error when trying to preview documents in client folder

action_items: Investigate document preview error - the document data is returned by API but frontend fails to render it
Note: Email sending via Brevo API returns 401 (authentication issue with external service) - this is a configuration issue, not a code bug
critical_code_review_comments: DocumentPreview.jsx: Well-structured with proper error handling and fallback to download
NotificationsManagement: Working correctly - can send notifications to all clients
DeclarationDetailView: Loads correctly without JavaScript errors
Rate limiting on login endpoint (5 per minute) may cause issues during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document preview in client folder shows error but download works. Notification sending to all clients works. Declarations page loads correctly for admin. Client login works but rate limiting (5/min) may cause test failures.

document_preview_admin.notes: Preview dialog opens but shows error 'Impossibile caricare il documento'. Download works correctly.

document_download.notes: Download completes successfully with toast 'Download completato'

notification_send_all.notes: Notification sent to 8 recipients with toast 'Invio in corso a 8 destinatari'

declarations_admin_access.notes: Declarations page loads correctly, shows 2 declarations for Test Commercialista User

declaration_detail_admin.notes: Detail view loads with tabs: Panoramica, Dati Inseriti, Documenti, Comunicazioni

declaration_documents_tab.notes: Shows 1 document (test_document.pdf) with preview and download buttons

client_login.notes: Client credentials work via API, rate limiting may cause UI login failures

known_issues.brevo_email_401: Email sending via Brevo API returns 401 - external service authentication issue, not code bug
known_issues.rate_limiting: Login endpoint has 5 requests per minute limit
